sentences.english: Adding two and three gives five.
sentences.hindi: दो और तीन जोड़ने पर पाँच होता है।
sentences.pronunciation: adding two and three gives five

sentences.english: Subtracting four from ten leaves six.
sentences.hindi: दस में से चार घटाने पर छह बचता है।
sentences.pronunciation: subtracting four from ten leaves six

sentences.english: Multiplying three by four gives twelve.
sentences.hindi: तीन को चार से गुणा करने पर बारह होता है।
sentences.pronunciation: multiplying three by four gives twelve

sentences.english: Dividing twenty by four gives five.
sentences.hindi: बीस को चार से भाग देने पर पाँच होता है।
sentences.pronunciation: dividing twenty by four gives five

sentences.english: This is an even number.
sentences.hindi: यह एक सम संख्या है।
sentences.pronunciation: this is an even number

sentences.english: Half is a fraction.
sentences.hindi: आधा एक भिन्न है।
sentences.pronunciation: half is a fraction

sentences.english: He got ninety percent marks in the exam.
sentences.hindi: उसे परीक्षा में नब्बे प्रतिशत अंक मिले।
sentences.pronunciation: he got ninety percent marks in the exam

sentences.english: Their average height is five feet.
sentences.hindi: उनकी औसत ऊँचाई पाँच फीट है।
sentences.pronunciation: their average height is five feet

sentences.english: A triangle has three sides.
sentences.hindi: त्रिभुज की तीन भुजाएँ होती हैं।
sentences.pronunciation: a triangle has three sides

sentences.english: All sides of a square are equal.
sentences.hindi: वर्ग की सभी भुजाएँ बराबर होती हैं।
sentences.pronunciation: all sides of a square are equal

sentences.english: A circle has no sides.
sentences.hindi: वृत्त की कोई भुजा नहीं होती।
sentences.pronunciation: a circle has no sides

sentences.english: This equation is easy to solve.
sentences.hindi: यह समीकरण हल करना आसान है।
sentences.pronunciation: this equation is easy to solve

sentences.english: This angle is ninety degrees.
sentences.hindi: यह कोण नब्बे डिग्री का है।
sentences.pronunciation: this angle is ninety degrees

sentences.english: The area of the room is twenty square metres.
sentences.hindi: कमरे का क्षेत्रफल बीस वर्ग मीटर है।
sentences.pronunciation: the area of the room is twenty square metres

sentences.english: The perimeter of the garden is one hundred metres.
sentences.hindi: बगीचे की परिधि सौ मीटर है।
sentences.pronunciation: the perimeter of the garden is one hundred metres

sentences.english: Maths is my favourite subject.
sentences.hindi: गणित मेरा पसंदीदा विषय है।
sentences.pronunciation: maths is my favourite subject

sentences.english: He calculates quickly and correctly.
sentences.hindi: वह जल्दी और सही गणना करता है।
sentences.pronunciation: he calculates quickly and correctly

sentences.english: This number is the largest.
sentences.hindi: यह संख्या सबसे बड़ी है।
sentences.pronunciation: this number is the largest

sentences.english: We have to solve this problem.
sentences.hindi: हमें यह सवाल हल करना है।
sentences.pronunciation: we have to solve this problem

sentences.english: The teacher taught multiplication.
sentences.hindi: शिक्षक ने गुणा सिखाया।
sentences.pronunciation: the teacher taught multiplication
